unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-IX · TN Admin & Unit-II · Current Events
desc: India's CEPA trade agreements with tariff cuts. Intensification of the Drug-Free TN campaign and Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan updates.

unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-IX · TN Admin & Unit-II · Current Events
desc: Passing of Tamil writer Poomani. Thungon Committee PRI recommendations. Appointment of Loyala Mani to TN Textbook Corporation.

title: July 10, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-IX · TN Admin & Unit-II · Current Events
desc: Analysis of the Ashok Mehta Committee (1977) recommendations proposing a 2-tier Panchayati Raj system. Launch of 'Nalam AI' WhatsApp chatbot by Tamil Nadu for hospital services. Geneva chosen to host the Global AI Summit 2027. Ministry of Agriculture's PRAGATI initiative. Uttarakhand as the 6th fully literate state via the ULLAS scheme. Google's AI Data Hub in Visakhapatnam.

title: July 09, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-VIII · History & Culture of TN & Unit-IX · TN Admin & Unit-V · Indian Polity
desc: Unearthing of a square brick well and peacock-painted pot at Karivalamvandanallur in Tenkasi. Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Department renamed to Social Justice Department in TN. Launch of TNEB's Repeat Tripping Elimination Program (RTEP). PM Chaa Shramik Protsahan Yojana for tea workers and Tribex for tribal education.

title: July 08, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-II · Current Events & Unit-IX · Development Admin
desc: Analysis of the Indrajit Gupta Committee (1998) recommendations on election funding. Prime Minister's address to the Indonesian Parliament and defense agreements. IIM Bangalore setting up a campus in East Java. Launch of the PM Internship Scheme. Performance Grading Index (PGI) 2.0. Police bureau appointments (NCRB, BPR&D).

title: July 07, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-II · Current Events & Unit-III · Geography
desc: BRICS Women's Working Group Meeting in Kochi and BRICS expansion analysis. Global Passport Index and Sustainable Development Report rankings. Master plan analysis of PM Gati Shakti integrating 16 ministries. Australia winning the ICC Women's T20 World Cup.

title: July 05 & 06, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-III · Geography & Unit-II · Current Events
desc: Analysis of the N.N. Vohra Committee (1993) on criminalization of politics. Maharashtra's ban on high-caffeine energy drinks near schools. Commercial production of Japanese Matcha tea in Assam. PM Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY) review. Record debut of Vaibhav Suryavanshi.

title: July 04, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-IX · TN Admin
desc: Analysis of the Dinesh Goswami Committee (1990) recommendations on electoral reforms. Introduction of VBPG Ramji scheme replacing MGNREGA with 125 guaranteed workdays. National Commission for Women (NCW) launching a new helpline (1490) and West Bengal setting up 'Durgavahini' patrol squad. Commemoration of the 250th USA Independence Day and updates on the International Booker Prize structure.

title: July 03, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-III · Geography & Unit-II · Current Events
desc: Retrospective analysis of the Tarkunde Committee (1974) recommendations on electoral reforms. First female PM of Japan, Sanae Takaichi, visiting India and Maruti Suzuki inaugurating a ₹35,000 Cr plant in Haryana. Mount Erebus in Antarctica spewing actual gold dust. Borjuli wetland in Assam declared a Biodiversity Heritage Site.

title: July 02, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-II · Current Events & Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-VI · Indian Economy
desc: Analysis of MECON Limited attaining Miniratna Category-I status. Retrospective on the Punchhi Commission (2007) and its Centre-State relations evaluation. Review of the Flamingo Revolution in Albania regarding tourism vs ecological preservation, and the RIMPAC exercise starting in Hawaii with Indian Navy participation.

title: July 01, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-II · Current Events & Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-IX · TN Administration
desc: Overview of the 29th National Conference on e-Governance in Jaipur and TNeGA history. Discussion on the Ranganath Mishra Commission on Minorities and the Yamuna Water Project between Rajasthan and Haryana. India-Greece tech collaboration with Greece accepting UPI. Obituary of Tamil author and Sahitya Akademi winner 'Puviyarasu'.

title: The Great Revolt of 1857 — Special Study Guide (English)
unit: Unit-IV · Indian History & Unit-VI · Indian National Movement (INM)
desc: High-yield crack sheet covering the Great Revolt of 1857 (Sepoy Mutiny), detailed political, economic, socio-religious, and military causes, centers and leaders of revolt, and failures and consequences.

title: 1857 பெருங்கிளர்ச்சி — சிறப்புப் பாடக் குறிப்பு (Tamil)
unit: Unit-IV · Indian History & Unit-VI · Indian National Movement (INM)
desc: 1857 பெருங்கிளர்ச்சியின் காரணங்கள், கிளர்ச்சியின் முக்கிய மையங்கள், தலைவர்கள், ஒடுக்குமுறை மற்றும் கம்பெனி ஆட்சியின் முடிவு முதல் விக்டோரியா பேரறிக்கை வரையிலான விரிவான தமிழ் வழிகாட்டி.

title: TN E-Governance — Special Study Guide (English)
unit: Unit-IX · Tamil Nadu Administration & Governance
desc: High-yield study sheet on Tamil Nadu E-Governance initiatives, timeline, interaction flows (G2C, G2G, G2B, G2E), state-level portals (e-Sevai, TNeGA), and Venkatesan 2026 updates.

title: தமிழ்நாடு மின் ஆளுமை — சிறப்புப் பாடக் குறிப்பு (Tamil)
unit: Unit-IX · Tamil Nadu Administration & Governance
desc: தமிழ்நாடு மின் ஆளுமை முகமை (TNeGA), மின் சேவை மையங்கள், G2C/G2G அமைப்புகள் மற்றும் வெங்கடேசன் 2026 பதிப்பு புதுப்பிப்புகள் அடங்கிய மின் ஆளுமை குறித்த பாடக்குறிப்பு.

title: Governor's Special Address — Special Study Guide (English)
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-IX · TN Administration
desc: High-yield conceptual breakdown of the Governor's Special Address (Article 176), historical context, state autonomy concepts, and key developments in Tamil Nadu.

title: ஆளுநர் உரை — சிறப்புப் பாடக் குறிப்பு (Tamil)
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-IX · TN Administration

title: June 29, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-IV · History & Culture & Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-VI · Indian Economy

Hemis Festival in Ladakh celebrating Tibetan Buddhism and its founder Guru Padmasambhava. National Statistics Day (June 29) honoring P.C. Mahalanobis and his contributions to India's Second Five-Year Plan. India's disaster relief operation 'Operation Amistad' in Venezuela and PM Modi's visit to Seychelles.

unit: Monthly Consolidation

desc: Monthly current affairs consolidation drill — 100 MCQs covering all February 2026 current affairs for TNPSC Group 1/2/4 revision. Appointments, schemes, science & tech, international, and Tamil Nadu updates.

title: June 27, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-VI · Indian Economy & Unit-IX · TN Administration
desc: The Tamil Nadu government appointed Venkat Narayana as the state's Special Representative in New Delhi. Haldia Port in West Bengal designated as an immigration check post. Garuda Tuber and Balam Kakadi from Madhya Pradesh received GI Tags. Reclassification of MSME parameters discussed on MSME Day (June 27). Mission Vatsalya highlighted as the umbrella scheme for child protection.

title: June 26, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-II · Current Events & Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-VI · Indian Economy
desc: CBI launched 'Operation Chakra-VI' to combat digital arrest frauds and cyber extortions. Mahesh Dixit appointed as the new Director of the Intelligence Bureau (IB). Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Ltd (GRSE) received the 'Navratna' status. Bangladesh joins the India-led International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA) as its 27th member.

title: June 25, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-IV · History & Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-VI · Indian Economy
desc: India's first private gold mine, the Jonagiri Gold Project, has commenced operations in Andhra Pradesh. The Ministry of Law and Justice launched the 'DISHA 2.0' scheme for citizen-centric access to justice. India ranks 2nd globally in inland fisheries according to the FAO's SOFIA Report. The nation commemorates the 1975 Emergency under 'Samvidhaan Hatya Diwas'.

title: June 24, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-VI · Indian Economy & Unit-IX · TN Administration
desc: Chennai Petroleum Corporation Limited (CPCL) officially granted Navratna status. Tamil Nadu government announces the 'Thaimaman Thanga Mothiram' scheme to provide gold rings to newborns in government hospitals. Kunal Shah appointed as the Global Head of WhatsApp. Reorganization of states and the historical significance of the Fazl Ali Commission (1953) discussed.

title: June 23, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-II · Current Events & Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-VII · INM
desc: Tushar Mehta reappointed as the Solicitor General of India for another 3-year term. Ambubachi Mela celebrated at Kamakhya Temple in Assam. Odisha exports Dried Whole Egg Powder to Austria. India acquires retired Jaguar aircraft airframes from the UK for spare parts.

title: June 20–22, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-II · Current Events & Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-IX · TN Administration
desc: India officially declared Naxal-free on 31 March 2026. 'Namo Cities' launched in NCR under Regional Plan 2041 to decongest Delhi. Bimal Patel elected to ITLOS and Vivek Aggarwal appointed VP of FATF. India ranks 70th in WEF's Energy Transition Index. Ladakh bans single-use plastics.

title: June 19, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-II · Current Events
desc: Jagannath Temple Puri secures India's first temple trademark for its symbols and slogans. TN Assembly dual rendition of National Anthem alongside Tamil Thai Valthu. Uzbekistan joins New Development Bank (NDB). UAE bans social media for children under 15. Indo-French Trishna Earth Observation Satellite strengthens bilateral aerospace ties.

title: June 18, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-VI · Economy & Unit-V · Indian Polity
desc: Sarvam AI becomes India's 130th Unicorn startup. WPI base year revised to 2022-23. IIT Hyderabad establishes India's first Nuclear Engineering Design Center (CODIEN). TN Governor's Special Address under Article 176(1). Startup ecosystem and fiscal policy updates for TNPSC revision.

title: June 17, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-IX · TN Admin & Unit-II · International
desc: Tamil Nadu Finance White Paper reveals state's structural debt and fiscal deficits. PM Modi attends 52nd G7 Summit in Evian-les-Bains, France. Telangana scales Breakfast Scheme with milk for Class 1–12. India Post launches first drone-based mail in Himachal Pradesh. Charles Wood's Dispatch (1854) history context.

title: June 16, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-IX · TN Welfare & Unit-II · Current Events
desc: TN Chief Minister's Morning Breakfast Scheme extended to Class 8. New GI Tags for Assam and Jharkhand products. PM Modi's historic Slovakia visit (White Double Cross award) and 'Bharat Innovates' in Nice, France. TN soldier Meenakshi Sundaram awarded Kirti Chakra. SHREYAS Scheme for SC/OBC/EWS students.

title: June 14–15, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-IV · History & Unit-II · International
desc: Keezhadi excavation (11th phase) reveals ancient iron smelting furnace — advanced early metallurgy. Odisha announces free universal education from KG to PG. India to host 18th BRICS Summit 2026; BRICS Indore Declaration on Agriculture. Lt. Gen. Dhiraj Seth appointed new Chief of Army Staff. India ranked 127th in Global Peace Index 2026.

title: June 13, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-III · Science & Tech & Unit-II · Current Events
desc: Ahmedabad introduces mandatory QR Code system for street food safety. IIT Madras launches 'Anchor' — world's most detailed 3D atlas of the human brainstem. IndiaAI Mission's Avatar AI unveils 'Varia' video story model. MP candidate Meenakshi Natarajan's nomination rejected over concealed criminal records — Election Commission norms.

title: June 12, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-IX · Dev Admin & Unit-II · Current Events
desc: NITI Aayog 11th Governing Council Meeting — Centre-State fiscal dynamics. Zojila Tunnel (J&K–Ladakh all-weather link) nearing completion. UPI global expansion clarified by Government. Supreme Court recognises homemaker's notional monthly income at ₹30,000 for compensation. Nipah virus first case of season reported in Kerala.

title: June 11, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-II · Current Events
desc: Daily current affairs for June 11, 2026 — Bharathiraja obituary, PM Modi breaks Nehru's PM record, FIFA 2026 World Cup kickoff, India-Navy anti-satellite jammers, and Tamil Nadu updates for TNPSC revision.

title: May 30, 2026 — TNPSC Current Affairs
unit: Unit-II · Current Events
desc: Daily current affairs for May 30, 2026 — key appointments, schemes, science & tech, and Tamil Nadu updates for TNPSC revision.

title: May 29, 2026 — Sikkim Fully Literate, RBI Dividend & Karnataka CM
unit: Unit-II · Current Events & Unit-VI · Economy
desc: Sikkim becomes India's 5th Fully Literate State (literacy >95%) under ULLAS scheme. RBI transfers record ₹2.87 Lakh Crore dividend to Central Government. D.K. Shivakumar assumes Karnataka CM role (implications for Mekedatu Dam / Cauvery dispute with Tamil Nadu). Demographic Change Committee formed under Justice Prakash Prabhakar (MHA). Tripura Mission Queen Pineapple — ₹200 cr project.

title: May 28, 2026 — Assam UCC, Geothermal Energy & Commonwealth Games
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Unit-III · Science & Tech
desc: Assam passes Uniform Civil Code (UCC) Bill — polygamy banned, marriage registration within 60 days, live-in registration within 1 month. India's first Geothermal Power Project in Puga Valley, Ladakh (ONGC). Commonwealth Games 2026: Glasgow, Scotland; Chef de Mission — Rohit Rajpal. Tamil Nadu CM's Delhi visit raising Centre-State relations. Mig La overtakes Umling La as highest motorable road.

title: May 27, 2026 — Andhra Fertility Incentives, Space Manufacturing & Conflict Research
unit: Unit-V · Indian Polity & Social Issues, Unit-VI · Geography & Economy
desc: Andhra Pradesh announces cash incentives for 3rd and 4th children to address TFR decline. Space sector: Manufacturing facilities approved for Tamil Nadu (Thoothukudi) and Gujarat. Human-Elephant Conflict Research Center established in Palamu Tiger Reserve, Jharkhand. Kerala launches 'Project Zero' against corruption. Indian Railways sets up 'CHIRAG' center in Hyderabad. Indian Army introduces AI platforms 'Kautilya' and 'Q-Force'.

title: May 26, 2026 — Sansad Ratna Awards, Shenzhou-23 & Kumbhalgarh
unit: Unit-III · Science & Tech & Unit-IV · History & Culture
desc: Sansad Ratna Award 2026: 12 MPs honoured by Prime Point Foundation (Chennai NGO, est. 2010 on APJ Abdul Kalam's suggestion). Kumbhalgarh Fort (Rajasthan) — 2nd longest continuous wall globally. China's Shenzhou-23 mission (Tiangong Space Station). DRDO Agni-1 SRBM test (700–900 km range).

title: May 25, 2026 — IBCA, Chandrayaan-3 Goddard Award & SMILE Scheme
unit: Unit-V · Environment & Unit-III · Science & Tech
desc: Saudi Arabia joins India-led International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA). Chandrayaan-3 wins prestigious Goddard Astronautics Award (AIAA). SMILE Scheme for marginalized persons & transgender. Hemis National Park (Ladakh) — India's largest NP (~4400 sq km). SDG 15 dimensions.

title: May 23, 2026 — TNUHDB Reshuffle, NCB Drug Op & Henley Index
unit: Unit-IX · Development Administration & Unit-II · Current Events
